studies.title: The Kaia COPD software Application:  a digital therapeutic delivering PR to symptomatic COPD patients for self-management in the home setting – a randomized, controlled, multicentered and multinational clinical study.

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the Kaia COPD software application, as evidenced by the title and detailed descriptions in both the German and English summaries. The study evaluates the effects of the Kaia COPD app on patients with COPD.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a 'randomized, controlled, multicentered and multinational clinical study' which indicates that participants are randomly allocated to either the intervention group using the Kaia COPD app or a control group receiving standard treatment, fitting the definition of an RCT.

studies.title: Impact of a Smartphone application (KAIA COPD-App) in combination with Activity Monitoring as maintenance program following pulmonary rehabilitation in COPD : an international multi-centered randomised controlled trial

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the 'KAIA COPD-App', which matches the product name 'Kaia COPD: Meine aktive COPD Therapie'. The manufacturer, Kaia Health Software GmbH, is also mentioned as the developer of the intervention.

_classification.reason: The study is described as an 'international multi-centered randomised controlled trial', indicating that participants are randomly allocated to an intervention group (using the COPD-App) and a control group (activity monitoring only), which is characteristic of an RCT.
